title: Angmngthoo
description: A single map for Doom II inspired by brutalist architecture — concrete masses, uncompromising geometry, dense detail. Released March 2023 on Doomworld.

screenshots.caption: Outdoor brutalist courtyard — concrete platforms, sparse trees, grid ceiling.

notes: [Doomworld thread](https://www.doomworld.com/forum/topic/134404-angmngthoo-brutalist-architectural-style-inspired-single-map-boom-compatible/) • [archive.org mirror](https://archive.org/details/doom2_wad_angmngthoo) • Author-uploaded archive.org mirror; catalog points at the stable .wad URL.
